customer_anxiety_profile: Cost-anxious first-time solar inquirer. Robert's stated barrier — 'I always heard how expensive it was' — was raised twice and never resolved. He is curious and cooperative but walking into the sit still holding the assumption that solar is expensive. He is not hostile; he just hasn't been given a reason to believe the cost framing has changed.
unresolved_concerns: Cost of panels and batteries — Robert named this as his 'biggest concern' at close of call; it was not inverted or resolved by the setter
Summer electric bill uncertainty — Robert noted the home is new (2 months), primarily gas, and he doesn't know what AC costs will look like; this is an unanchored forward-looking anxiety

Wife's presence at the appointment — not explicitly confirmed; she is on the title and holds the qualifying credit score (close to 700); Robert's score (604) does not meet the stated threshold on its own
sensitive_topics_raised: New homeowner (2 months) — limited bill history; Robert cannot give a reliable average
Night-shift household — both Robert and wife work nights; scheduling window is narrow (3:30–5 PM); any rescheduling will require navigating this constraint
Robert's credit score (604) is below the stated threshold; qualification runs through the wife's score
exact_promises_rep_made: Appointment booked for tomorrow the 19th at 3:30 PM
Rep will send a text with the day and time
Framed as a specialist 'stopping by' — language implies in-person visit, not a phone call
closer_should_know: Confirm the appointment format with Robert before the sit — the setter used 'stop by' language and never clarified this is a phone call. If Robert is expecting an in-person visit and a phone call comes, the sit is at risk. Also confirm the wife will be on the call: she is on the title, holds the qualifying credit score, and was not explicitly confirmed as a participant. Lead with the cost reframe — Robert's barrier is 'I always heard solar was expensive' and it was never inverted; the closer should address it early and directly.
